candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current asset line, not ACT.
Balancing item, not a reported current assets total.
Non-current assets total, not ACT.
Balancing item rather than the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash-related but appears more like a component/alternate presentation than the main reported total.
Cash-related but excludes restricted cash and is not as clean as the main total.
Cash flow line, not a balance-sheet cash balance.
Operating cash flow, not CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred the exact balance-sheet cash total.

candidates.why: Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Cash flow change line, not a balance-sheet stock variable.
Balancing item and non-current, not LCT.
Non-current liabilities total, not LCT.
Balancing item rather than the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: Interest payable is not debt principal and should be excluded from STD.
Represents current portion of long-term debt; valid STD component, but not present across all years and may be superseded by a cleaner total current debt line.
Clean reported current financing debt line on the balance sheet; best match for STD and excludes lease liabilities.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a cleaner reported current debt total outside the shortlist. Excluded lease liabilities and avoided double counting with 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year'.

candidates.why: Represents payroll/social taxes rather than income taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Deferred tax is non-current tax accounting, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No clear balance-sheet line for taxes payable/current tax liabilities. 'Social security and other taxes' is not a reliable substitute for income taxes payable.

candidates.why: Exact match for total/net property, plant and equipment.
Intangible assets are not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Gross - Total
candidates.why: Intangible assets are not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Not PPE; contra-intangible line.
Not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value line, less clean than the main reported total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: ROU asset component and gross amount, not preferred total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Cash flow investing line, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit net total PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total assets line.

candidates.why: Semantically related to operating cash flow, but appears blank and may be an intermediate subtotal rather than the final net operating cash flow.
Directly states cash flow from operations and is the clearest net operating cash flow line.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit net cash flow from operating activities line outside the shortlist; it is clearer than the blank subtotal 'Cash Generated from Operations'.
